queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the absence of a checking account as a mitigating determinant of credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Statistical impact of a credit history characterized by critical accounts or other existing credits on reducing credit risk drivers.
Determinants of default: evaluating the protective effect of loan duration in months on credit default probability.
